description:
Operational dashboard for retry dispatch monitoring. Monitors poll cycles, dispatch throughput, Kafka producer health, Redis latency, and error rates.

How to use this dashboard: Start from the top Overview row to verify SLO health, then drill into throughput, latency, errors, and JVM sections to isolate bottlenecks. Use the service template filter to narrow scope during incidents and compare behavior across dimensions. Panel info icon meaning: Click the i icon in each panel header to see what the metric represents, how to interpret normal vs abnormal values, and what operational signal it provides.

panels.description: Total poll cycles executed in the selected time range.
panels.title: Poll Cycles

panels.description: Total jobs dispatched (sent to Kafka) in the selected time range.
panels.title: Jobs Dispatched

panels.description: Jobs successfully confirmed by Kafka broker in the selected time range.
panels.title: Kafka Requeue Success

panels.description: Total Kafka send failures in the selected time range. Should be 0 in normal operation.
panels.title: Kafka Requeue Failures

panels.description: Jobs that failed JSON deserialization and were skipped. Indicates corrupt data in Redis.
panels.title: Deserialization Failures

panels.description: Poll cycles skipped because the previous cycle was still in progress. Non-zero indicates backpressure.
panels.title: Polls Skipped (Overlap)

panels.description: Share of retry attempts that are successfully requeued to Kafka. Derived from retry success and failure counters.
panels.title: Retry Success %

panels.description: Share of retry attempts that fail during Kafka requeue.
panels.title: Retry Failure %

panels.description: Current retry backlog depth. Uses retry backlog gauges when available; otherwise defaults to 0.
panels.title: Retry Backlog

targets.expr: sum(max by (service) (retry_poller_backlog_size{service=~"${service:regex}"})) or sum(max by (service) (retry_backlog_size{service=~"${service:regex}"})) or sum(max by (service) (retry_queue_backlog{service=~"${service:regex}"})) or vector(0)

panels.description: Retry dispatch latency, using poll-loop P99 as the end-to-end retry dispatch timing signal.
panels.title: Dispatch Latency P99

panels.description: Kafka producer error rate as a percent of record send rate.
panels.title: Kafka Producer Error Rate

panels.description: Redis polling latency from Lettuce command completion P95. Reflects Redis-side contribution to retry polling delay.
panels.title: Redis Poll Latency P95

panels.description: Rate of jobs dispatched from the retry queue to Kafka per second over time.
panels.title: Dispatch Rate (jobs/sec)

panels.description: Current number of Kafka sends that have been submitted but not yet acknowledged. High values indicate Kafka broker backpressure.
panels.title: In-Flight Kafka Sends

panels.description: Poll cycle duration quantiles (P50, P90, P95, P99). Includes Redis fetch + Kafka dispatch loop. Uses recording rules first, then falls back to client percentiles (quantile label), then avg/max so the panel does not stay blank when polling is active.
panels.title: Poll Duration (P50 / P90 / P95 / P99)

targets.expr: chrono:retry_poller_poll_duration_p50_seconds:5m{service=~"${service:regex}"} or on(service) max by (service) (retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds{service=~"${service:regex}",quantile="0.5"}) or on(service) (rate(retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds_sum{service=~"${service:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) / clamp_min(rate(retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds_count{service=~"${service:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]), 1e-9))

chrono:retry_poller_poll_duration_p90_seconds:5m{service=~"${service:regex}"} or on(service) max by (service) (retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds{service=~"${service:regex}",quantile="0.9"}) or on(service) (rate(retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds_sum{service=~"${service:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) / clamp_min(rate(retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds_count{service=~"${service:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]), 1e-9))

chrono:retry_poller_poll_duration_p95_seconds:5m{service=~"${service:regex}"} or on(service) max by (service) (retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds{service=~"${service:regex}",quantile="0.95"}) or on(service) (rate(retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds_sum{service=~"${service:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) / clamp_min(rate(retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds_count{service=~"${service:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]), 1e-9))

chrono:retry_poller_poll_duration_p99_seconds:5m{service=~"${service:regex}"} or on(service) max by (service) (retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds{service=~"${service:regex}",quantile="0.99"}) or on(service) max_over_time(retry_poller_poll_duration_seconds_max{service=~"${service:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])

panels.description: Total number of poll duration measurements recorded. Integer value is expected because this is a counter. If this is > 0, poll duration instrumentation is active.
panels.title: Poll Duration Sample Count

panels.description: Average number of jobs fetched per poll cycle. Should be close to batch-size (250) when the retry queue is backlogged, or near 0 when idle.
panels.title: Avg Jobs per Poll Cycle

panels.description: Kafka producer record send rate using the native Kafka JMX metric exposed through Micrometer. Compares dispatched rate with confirmed send rate.
panels.title: Kafka Producer — Record Send & Error Rate

panels.description: Kafka producer batch size (avg bytes per batch) and buffer available bytes. Monitors producer memory pressure.
panels.title: Kafka Producer — Batch Size & Buffer Memory

panels.description: Lettuce command completion latency for retry-dispatcher. The primary command is EVALSHA (Lua script execution for claim_due_jobs). Sourced from pre-computed recording rules.
panels.title: Lettuce Command Latency (P50/P95/P99)

panels.description: Lettuce command throughput (ops/sec) for the retry-dispatcher. Shows how many Redis commands are executed per second.
panels.title: Lettuce Command Throughput (ops/sec)

panels.description: Deserialization failures and skipped polls over time. Persistent deserialization failures indicate corrupted data in Redis. Skipped polls indicate the poller cannot keep up (backpressure from Redis or Kafka).
panels.title: Error Rates Over Time

panels.description: In-flight Kafka sends over time. Sustained high values indicate Kafka is slow to acknowledge. Correlate with poll duration P99 and buffer available bytes.
panels.title: In-Flight Kafka Sends Over Time

panels.description: JVM heap memory usage for the retry-dispatcher process.
panels.title: JVM Heap Memory

panels.description: JVM thread count and GC pause durations for retry-dispatcher.
panels.title: JVM Threads & GC

title: Retry Dispatcher
